metas.name: The Apothecary Diaries Season 3
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Mystery Tags:Medicine/Female Protagonist/Politics/Ancient China/Detective/Historical/Seinen/Heterosexual/Class Struggle/Femboy The third season of Kusuriya no Hitorigoto.

In the aftermath of the Shi Clan’s rebellion, things have finally settled down, and Maomao has returned to her old life as a pharmacist in the pleasure district.

One day, triggered by a breakfast served at the Verdigris House, Maomao senses an anomaly and begins investigating its true nature.

Meanwhile, Jinshi, who has revealed his true identity as the Imperial brother and begun to face his heavy responsibilities, is deeply troubled by the final message left by Loulan: a warning of an impending "disaster that will strike the nation."

To make matters worse, rumors of a mysterious shrine maiden who deceives the people begin to spread, casting a dark shadow over the country of Li once again.

From the depths of the inner court to the city streets, and across foreign borders—the world grows wider, and the stakes even higher for Maomao and Jinshi.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

metas.name: Black Clover Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy Tags:Magic/Male Protagonist/Shounen/Demons/Medieval The second season of Black Clover.

metas.name: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Drama, Sci-Fi Tags:Cyberpunk/Cyborg/Urban/Crime/Guns/Gore/Dystopian/Advertisement Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 presents a new standalone 10-episode story from the world of Cyberpunk 2077— a raw chronicle of redemption and revenge.

When the world is blinded by spectacle, what extremes do you have to go to make your story matter?

(Source: Official Twitter)

metas.name: Tensei Shitara Ken Deshita 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Nekomimi/Swordplay/Magic/Kemonomimi/Isekai/Gore/Cute Girls Doing Cute Things/Medieval/Urban Fantasy/Food The second season of Tensei Shitara Ken Deshita.

metas.name: Blue Box Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Romance, Slice of Life, Sports Tags:Primarily Teen Cast/Heterosexual/Iyashikei/School/Male Protagonist/Coming of Age/Badminton/Acrobatics/Shounen/Female Protagonist/Basketball/Unrequited Love The second season of Ao no Hako.

metas.name: Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen
metas.description: Genres: Action, Drama, Romance, Supernatural Tags:Delinquents/Gangs/Shounen/Urban Sequel to Tokyo Revengers: Tenjiku-hen.

metas.name: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure 2nd - 3rd STAGE
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Cowboys/Foreign/Male Protagonist/Disability/Primarily Adult Cast The second race stage of JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken: Steel Ball Run.

In the 2nd STAGE, a desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles- the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must challenge, is home to the area that is feared as the "Devil's Palm." In 1875, a threat lurking in said desert wiped out a cavalry of 26 people, eliciting fear from the local native people. As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition. The two press forward, where countless hidden motives collide.

(Source: Warner Bros. Japan Anime, Netflix Anime, edited)

metas.name: Tantei wa mou, Shindeiru. Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Drama, Mystery, Romance, Supernatural Tags:Detective/Heterosexual/Aliens The second season of Tantei wa mou, Shindeiru.

metas.name: A Returner's Magic Should be Special Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist The second season of Kikansha no Mahou wa Tokubetsu desu.

metas.name: Aoashi 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Sports Tags:Football/Seinen/Male Protagonist The second season of Aoashi.

metas.name: The Ramparts of Ice Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life Tags:School/Primarily Teen Cast/Ensemble Cast/Female Protagonist/Heterosexual/Kuudere The second season of Koori no Jouheki.

metas.name: Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru 3rd Season
metas.description: Genres: Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Isekai The third season of Tensei Kizoku, Kantei Skill de Nariagaru.

metas.name: Firefly Wedding
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance Tags:Yandere/Josei/Assassins/Heterosexual/Historical/Prostitution/Disability/Female Protagonist/Primarily Adult Cast/Marriage/Survival On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously.

(Source: VIZ Media)

metas.name: Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc
metas.description: Genres: Action, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Shounen/Demons/Guns Sequel to Tougen Anki.

metas.name: Ranma1/2 (2024) Season 3
metas.description: Genres: Action, Comedy, Romance Tags:Gender Bending/Martial Arts/Shapeshifting/Arranged Marriage/Love Triangle/School The third season of Ranma 1/2 (2024).

metas.name: Sasaki and Peeps Season 2
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo Tags:Urban Fantasy/Animals/Male Protagonist/Isekai The second season of Sasaki to Pii-chan.

metas.name: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Super Power/Martial Arts/Shounen/Gods/Henshin/Male Protagonist/Aliens Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences.

(Source: Dragon Ball Official Site)

metas.name: Seitokai ni mo Ana wa Aru!
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life Tags:Nudity/Mixed Gender Harem/Femboy/Shounen/School Mizunoe Ume just wanted to avoid repeating a grade when he joined the student council. After all, it seemed like an easy fix to his current academic problems. But then, he met his fellow council members. Each of them is eccentric in their own way-one's an airhead, another's scary, one's secretly a pervert, but all in all, they're just really weird! Yet somehow, they're also oddly cute and endearing. Which means Mizunoe is stuck with them and all the chaos they bring to the table.

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Chitose-kun wa Ramune Bin no Naka Part 2
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Romance Tags:Female Harem/Primarily Female Cast/Primarily Teen Cast/School/Philosophy/Male Protagonist/Heterosexual The second part of Chitosekun wa Ramune Bin no Naka.

metas.name: Hyouken no Majutsushi ga Sekai wo Suberu II
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy
Tags:Magic/School/Swordplay/Class Struggle
The second season of Hyouken no Majutsushi ga Sekai wo Suberu.

metas.name: Overgeared
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy Tags: Sin Yeong-U (a.k.a. Grid), an unlucky man in life and a low-level player in the popular VR game “Satisfy,” finds a powerful item that earns him a rare legendary class title: “Pagma’s Successor.” He’s now a skilled blacksmith who can forge unique weapons and equip the game’s most powerful gear. Grid resolves to use his new abilities to achieve fame and fortune, but as his very existence begins to stir up trouble in Satisfy, he realizes that life as a legend may be more than he bargained for….

(Source: Tapas, edited)

metas.name: Magic Knight Rayearth (2026)
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo, Mecha Tags:Female Protagonist/Shoujo/Isekai/Tomboy/Magic/Super Power/Super Robot/Henshin/Medieval/Primarily Female Cast/Ojou-sama/Primarily Child Cast/Robots/Archery/Swordplay In celebration of "Magic Knight Rayearth” animes' 30th anniversary, a new animation project has been launched!

Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

metas.name: Tensei shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Dragons/Shounen Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she’s the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes…and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: PSYREN
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Sci-Fi Tags:Shounen/Death Game/Dystopian/Super Power/Male Protagonist One day, high schooler Ageha Yoshina picks up a mysterious “red phone card” left behind in a public telephone booth. A few days later, his childhood friend and classmate, Sakurako Amamiya—who possessed the same card—suddenly vanishes without a trace. In search of her, Ageha finds himself drawn into the rumors surrounding a nationwide string of mysterious disappearances, said to be the work of a secret organization known only as “Psyren.”

When he accesses the group, a deadly game begins—one that will change his fate forever.

(Source: PSYЯEN Official Site)

metas.name: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Mecha, Romance, Sci-Fi Tags:Isekai/Female Harem/Space/Heterosexual/Space Opera/Elf/Seinen Sato Takahiro was an ordinary office worker and hobbyist gamer until the day he woke up on a spaceship–one that strangely resembled a craft from a favorite space-shooter game. With a decked-out ship, a crew full of babes, and a fantastic universe to explore, he's going to make the most of his good luck and create the life he's always dreamed of!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Mahou Shoujo Ikusei Keikaku: restart
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo, Thriller Tags:Female Protagonist/Magic/Kuudere/Primarily Female Cast A stage reading in the Magical Girl Raising Project franchise announced that an anime adaptation of Asari Endou's Magical Girl Raising Project Restart light novel volumes has been green-lit. Hiroyuki Hashimoto reported on Twitter that he will return from the first Magical Girl Raising Project anime as the director. The franchise's Twitter account also teased that various initiatives are in the works for "Project restart."

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Toaru Anbu no ITEM
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Sci-Fi Tags: This is a story of four girls living in the "Dark Side" of Academy City.

In Academy City where "ESP" has been recognized as a general science. Behind the peace, there is a Dark Side organization that undertakes missions that cannot be made public.

"ITEM" is an elite unit consisting of four girls. Takitsubo Rikou is able to read and track the AIM fields emitted by those with abilities. Frenda Seivelun, who excels in combat using explosives and traps.

Kinuhata Saiai, who can manipulate nitrogen at will and plays a defensive role. And one of the 7 Espers that Academy City is proud of: Mugino Shizuri. They live freely in the darkness of the Academy City, and quietly set their sights on their target...!

This is a story of encounter, friendship, and darkness that eventually leads to a terrible incident!

(Source: Kadokawa, translated)

metas.name: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Seinen A great hero lies undefeated on her deathbed, regretting that she never found a foe who could take her down. She never intended to meet her fate anywhere other than on the battlefield, and her peaceful demise has her wishing desperately that things could have been different... But when she suddenly comes to in the body of the young, frail Nia Liston, she’s got an all-new fight ahead of her. Nia is a sickly child, meaning she has a long way to go before she’s in fighting form. Now that she’s been given a second shot at life, however, she’s determined to get what she wants. She’s going to live—and die—for battle this time! Make way for the Merciless Maiden!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance Tags:Heterosexual/Seinen Sato-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer.

Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat!

Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

metas.name: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy, Romance Tags:Witch/Hikikomori/Female Protagonist/Josei/Heterosexual/Rural/Medicine “Make me a love potion.”

And with that single sentence, the Good Witch of the Lake’s secret crush on the dashing Sir Harij ends in heartbreak. Still, when he promises to help her gather the ingredients, Rose is thrilled at the chance to gaze upon a man she’d normally never get to interact with. She learns to brace her pounding heart for their usual stilted conversations…but what is she to do when he inexplicably shows up at her doorstep with bread and a jar of apple butter?

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Magical★Explorer: Eroge no Yuujin Chara ni Tensei Shitakedo, Game Chishiki Tsukatte Jiyuu ni Ikiru
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Magic/Isekai/Female Harem/School/Male Protagonist/Seinen Few titles are more revered among horndogs-(ahem) connoisseurs of Japanese erotic video games-than Magical Explorer. One day, our smut-loving hero wakes up to find he has been reincarnated into the body of the game’s dreamboat protagonist! Or rather, his hapless comic-relief best friend, Kousuke Takioto. But with his unparalleled knowledge of Magical Explorer and Kousuke’s unorthodox abilities (a scarf that doubles as a fist?), our hero vows to turn the game’s unluckiest loser into its mightiest heartthrob. In this world, nothing is out of reach when you’ve got the know-how!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Mission: Yozakura Family Season 2 Part 2
metas.description: Genres: Action, Comedy, Romance Tags: The second cour of the second season of Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen.

metas.name: Kanojo no Tomodachi
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Ecchi, Romance Tags:Heterosexual/Seinen/Netorare For the first time in my life, I have a girlfriend. But her friend tempts me with a body that's so seductive... What would you do if your girlfriend's friend came on to you like this?

(Source: Yanmaga, translated)

metas.name: Kaijuu 8-gou: Narumi no Heijitsu
metas.description:
Genres: Slice of Life
Tags:
An original short anime about Narumi's daily life at work.

metas.name: I'm Dating a Dark Summoner
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Heterosexual/Nudity/Seinen Amona, a dark summoner and demi-human who uses demonic powers, is the newest addition to the party of the uptight cleric Roni. Everyone expected the two to dislike each other and to have nothing to do with each other. But to their surprise, on their first day together as an adventuring party, they had a one-night stand...!

(Source: Comic Dragon Age, translated)

metas.name: Tsuihou Sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka Suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life Tags:Shounen/Male Protagonist/Magic Rain Garland, an enchantment mage belonging to the ‘Fangs of the Royal Beast’, one of the continent's five great guilds, was suddenly expelled from the guild one day. Filled with bitter disappointment at being betrayed by those he trusted, Rain retrieved all the Enhancement Points he had placed on the guild's armor. He then tried applying them to his own sword and clothes instead the cheap copper sword gained destructive power rivaling legendary blades, and the simple cloth garments gained defense comparable to orichalcum!? Moreover, Rain's enchantment magic held a cheat-level secret that allowed it to evolve even further!?

After meeting new companions like the renowned beautiful knight Lily, who came upon hearing rumors of Rain, and the noble lady Martina, a candidate for the title of Hero, Rain begins to grow into a great adventurer...!?

(Source: Kodansha, translated)

metas.name: Sekai Saikyou no Majo, Hajimemashita
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Magic/Meta/Parody/Shounen When Rona manifests what seems to be a terribly useless skill, she’s considered an embarrassment to her family and gets kicked out of the house. With no money or food, she nears her darkest hour… when she suddenly figures out how to use her skill called “Internet.” It allows her to produce unlimited valuable items and even acquire rare equipment without participating in any events. With this skill of godlike knowledge, she can do anything she wants!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Yowaki MAX Reijou Nano ni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Villainess/Female Protagonist/Heterosexual/Shoujo/Isekai I was reborn as a villainous daughter in a reverse harem otome game.

After being sick with a high fever at the age of 10, Pia Rockwell suddenly remembered her past life as a university student in Japan. But far from going down the villainess route, all this super timid girl wants is to finally use her knowledge from when she was a grad student studying to get her doctorate in paleontology. Her ultimate goal is to become a commoner, excavate fossils, build a museum and then become a curator.

So in order to escape the villainess route and avoid being deported by her fiancé during the graduation ball, Pia decides to avoid the upcoming hurt and heartache and asks to break off her engagement to Rufus, the Prime Minister's son.

But will her cunning fiancé let her go that easily?

metas.name: #Zombie Sagashitemasu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Zombie/Post-Apocalyptic/Female Protagonist/Cute Girls Doing Cute Things/Shounen The manga is set in a world where 90 percent of humans on Earth have contracted and died from a deadly, virulent disease; only to then rise again as zombies who only attack people. 13 years after that "Red Day" of societal and civilizational collapse, the surviving humans survive away from the big cities, while still hoping to retake them someday. An entirely new generation of people who know nothing of the pre-Red Day world are now coming into their own. The story begins when Aki and her close friends Haru and Natsuki begin a journey to find Aki's missing father.

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Kashita Maryoku wa [Revo Barai] de Kyousei Choushuu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Magic/Fairy/Revenge/Seinen If there's one thing you can never have enough of in a world of RPG-style swords and sorcery, it's magic points! Whether you're fueling spells, techniques, or showing off an incredible ability, you've gotta spend those points to do real damage. But what if you run out?

Lent is part of the up-and-coming party known as the “Skypiercers,” and thanks to his unique Gift, he can loan massive amounts of magic to others. No MP? No problem with Lent around! Except, now that his companions have become formidable heroes (thanks to his skill), his usefulness is questioned. Kicked out of the group, Lent is furious…until he discovers a hidden power to his Gift. Now, with his adorably devious fairy partner, he's going to claw back every last scrap of magic from his former party—with interest!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: TANK CHAIR: Sensha Isu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Sci-Fi Tags:Disability/Full CGI/Shounen Shizuka takes on the most dangerous of assassin jobs, but she's not the one doing the killing. Rather, it's her brother, Nagi, a strong assassin who took a bullet to protect his sister, leaving him in a comatose state and having to use a wheelchair. However, Shizuka has figured out the key to waking her brother up: he must be faced with killing intent! Thus begins a violent journey of recovery, battling the most dangerous foes!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Hotel Inhumans 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Action, Drama Tags: The second season of Hotel Inhumans.

metas.name: Devils' Crest
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Female Protagonist/Video Games/Death Game/Urban Fantasy Sixth-grader Yuuma Ashihara and his twin sister, Sawa, are playing Actual Magic , a brand-new virtual reality MMORPG, when it suddenly begins fusing with the real world. Amid all the chaos and confusion, it becomes clear that death is lurking around every corner, including when Yuuma runs into his classmate Sumika. Before, she was one of the cutest girls in his class, but she’s since undergone a terrible metamorphosis—into one of the game’s horrifying monsters! From the author of Sword Art Online and Accel World comes a story beyond VR and AR, where gaming and reality are one and the same…and staying alive is just the beginning!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Kyoufu Collector
metas.description:
Genres: Horror, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Youkai/Urban Fantasy Urban legends come to life…Everyone’s heard an urban legend before, but few have ever come face-to-face with one. These phenomena are everywhere, existing in the shadows of reality. More and more of them have been appearing in the wake of the faceless kid sighted all over Japan. If you see her or one of the urban legends she brings―pray the boy in the red hood finds you before it’s too late. You won’t stand a chance on your own. But with his help, you may just live to see another day…

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Gensou Suikoden
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags: During Suikoden Live Broadcast, Konami announced Suikoden: The Anime, an anime adaptation of Suikoden II. Suikoden: The Anime will be the first anime series directly handled by Konami Animation.

(Source: finalweapon.net)

metas.name: Diamond no Ace act II: Second Season Part 2
metas.description: Genres: Sports Tags:Baseball/Shounen/Male Protagonist/Primarily Male Cast/School Club The second cour of the second season of Diamond no Ace act II.

metas.name: Tensei Goblin Dakedo Shitsumon Aru?
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Goblin/Magic/Seinen Office worker Akira Yagami’s altruistic nature usually gets him the short end of the stick. When he dies after saving a kid from oncoming traffic...he reincarnates in another world as a goblin?! Normally, goblins only live for seven days, but Akira’s newfound powers let him defy the species’ normal life span...and are the key to his path to becoming the strongest goblin ever!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Choujun! Choujou Senpai
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life
Tags:Police/Primarily Adult Cast/Super Power/Surreal Comedy/Urban/Shounen/Meta
In Chinjuku, the city that never sleeps, there is a psychic senior police officer who has powers beyond human comprehension! His name is Meguru Chojo! Along with his judo expert partner Nao Ippongi, this hilarious duo will keep the streets clean by any means necessary!

metas.name: Shinja Zero no Megami-sama to Hajimeru Isekai Kouryaku
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Gods/Isekai/Male Protagonist/Magic/Seinen RPG player Makoto Takatsuki is hurled into another world with awful skills and stats. But he soon meets a goddess named Noah, who asks him to become her 1st believer in return for blessings.

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Kanata Kara
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Isekai/Heterosexual/Shoujo/Language Barrier On her way home from school one day, Noriko is unexpectedly plunged into a strange and extraordinary fantasy world. Her troubles compound exponentially when she is rescued and befriended by a handsome young man by the name of Izark. He may be brave and courageous, but inside Izark lurks the darkest evil imaginable. And according to an ancient prophecy, Noriko possesses the power to unleash that evil. Now, inexorably bound together, these two unlikely allies must navigate a world both wondrous and hostile.

(Source: VIZ Media)
